raw_consumer_statement:
Description of What Happened : On XX/XX/XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX, three unauthorized transactions totaling {$35000.00} were posted to my Citi credit card ending in XXXX. The charges were : {$10000.00} on XX/XX/XXXX {$12000.00} on XX/XX/XXXX {$12000.00} on XX/XX/XXXX All transactions were processed by XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX CA, a merchant with which I have no relationship. 

I was traveling abroad from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX and did not authorize these charges. During this time, I received alerts from Citi indicating that similar transactions had been declined, which confirms suspicious activity. 
On XX/XX/XXXX, after returning to the U.S., I contacted Citi Banks Fraud Department to report and dispute these charges. During this call, I discovered two unauthorized payments from my checking account toward this credit card via phone : {$11000.00} {$12000.00} Total : {$23000.00} I immediately requested refunds from Citi and my bank. Citi issued a credit refund on XX/XX/XXXX, and the amount was deposited back into my checking account on XX/XX/XXXX. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received an email from Citi stating that the dispute was resolved and marked as Customer Responsible. On XX/XX/XXXX, I called Citis Dispute Department to contest this decision. I was told that a call on XX/XX/XXXX allegedly accepted all three charges. I did not make any such call and requested the dispute be reopened immediately. 
Despite my repeated efforts, Citi has not provided a satisfactory resolution or explanation for these fraudulent transactions and the unauthorized phone payments. I am requesting a full investigation into : The fraudulent charges totaling {$35000.00} The alleged XX/XX/XXXX call that I did not make. 

I am seeking confirmation that I am not responsible for these charges and that Citi will take appropriate action to prevent further fraud.
